title: Nsil1-Msp1 RAD-digest Detailed Protocol
author: Ben JG Sutherland
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.w95fh86

steps.title: Suspend lyophilized single stranded adapters to...
steps.instruction: Suspend lyophilized single stranded adapters to final stock concentration of 100µM in 1XEB . -Adapter 1 top and bottom will be combined in plate format. Each well corresponding to an individual adapter. -Adapter 2 top and bottom will be combined in strip tubes. -Final Working Stock will contain 0.02µM Adapter

steps.title: Make 100µL of 10µM double stranded adapter
steps.instruction: Make 100µL of 10µM double stranded adapter. undetermined, gH20 undetermined, 10X AB undetermined, Top adapter undetermined, Bottom adapter ____________________ undetermined, TOTAL Repeat this step for both Adapter 1 and Adapter 2.

steps.title: Place top and bottom Adapter 1...
steps.instruction: Place top and bottom Adapter 1 mixture onto the Thermocycler and run "RAD Anneal" program. 01:12:00, RAD Anneal

steps.title: Check the annealed adapters with the Qubit
steps.instruction: Check the annealed adapters with the Qubit.

steps.title: Dilute Adapter 1 from 10µM to 3µM
steps.instruction: Dilute Adapter 1 from 10µM to 3µM. undetermined, Sample undetermined, gH20 ____________________ undetermined, TOTAL

steps.title: Adapter 2 will remain at 10µM...
steps.instruction: Adapter 2 will remain at 10µM and can be stored at 4°C.

steps.title: Normalize Adapter 1 to 2
steps.instruction: Normalize Adapter 1 to 2.2ng/µL (0.1µM) and store at 4°C.

steps.title: Create a100µLof "Working Adapter Stock"
steps.instruction: Create a100µLof "Working Adapter Stock". undetermined, Normalized (2.2ng/µL) Adapter 1 undetermined, 10µM Adapter 2 undetermined, 1X AB ____________________ undetermined, TOTAL

steps.title: Seal plate, vortex and spin down...
steps.instruction: Seal plate, vortex and spin down before storing at 4°C until used.

steps.title: Quantify genomic DNA to ensure samples...
steps.instruction: Quantify genomic DNA to ensure samples contain between 20ng/µL and 150ng/µL. Genomic DNA is selected based on gel electrophoresis and Qubit results.

steps.title: Create a 30µL aliquot of 20ng/µL...
steps.instruction: Create a 30µL aliquot of 20ng/µL genomic DNA using AE Buffer as diluent.

steps.title: Store at 4° unti used
steps.instruction: Store at 4° unti used.

steps.title: Create Restriction Master Mix
steps.instruction: Create Restriction Master Mix: Per reaction: undetermined, gH20 undetermined, Nsil1 undetermined, Msp1 undetermined, Cutsmart Buffer ____________________ 10 µL, TOTAL

steps.title: Add 10µL of Restriction Master Mix to each well
steps.instruction: Add 10µL of Restriction Master Mix to each well.

steps.title: Add 10µL of 20ng/µL genomic DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 10µL of 20ng/µL genomic DNA sample to the Restriction Master Mix.

steps.title: Seal plate and run "RAD-digest" PCR program
steps.instruction: Seal plate and run "RAD-digest" PCR program. 01:09:00, RAD-digest program

steps.title: Proceed directly to ligation step
steps.instruction: Proceed directly to ligation step.

steps.title: Create Ligation Master Mix
steps.instruction: Create Ligation Master Mix: Per reaction: undetermined, gH20 undetermined, T4 DNA Ligase Reaction BUffer undetermined, T4 DNA Ligase ____________________ undetermined, TOTAL

steps.title: Add 5µL of Adapter Working Stock...
steps.instruction: Add 5µL of Adapter Working Stock to the 20µL restriction digest product.

steps.title: Add 15µL of Ligation Master Mix...
steps.instruction: Add 15µL of Ligation Master Mix to the 25µL of working adapter and restriction digest product. undetermined, TOTAL

steps.title: Seal plate and run "RAD-ligation" PCR program
steps.instruction: Seal plate and run "RAD-ligation" PCR program. 02:25:00, RAD-ligation Program

steps.title: Ligated DNA stored at 4°C until use
steps.instruction: Ligated DNA stored at 4°C until use.

steps.title: Pool 5µL of each sample into a single tube
steps.instruction: Pool 5µL of each sample into a single tube.

steps.title: Perform a column clean-up with QIAquick PCR Purification Kit
steps.instruction: Perform a column clean-up with QIAquick PCR Purification Kit. Calculate the volume of pooled sample. Add 5 volumes of PB to sample. Transfer 600µL to filter column and spin at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through and add second 600µL aliquot to filter column before spinning at 17,900 for 1 minute. Discard flow-through, add 750µL of PE and spin at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through and spin empty column at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through and transfer filter column to new (pre-labelled) epi tube. Add 60µL of EB to the center of the membrane before spinning at 17,900g for 1 minute. Keep flow-through and store at 4°C until size select.

steps.title: Transfer 30µL of sample to a clean epi
steps.instruction: Transfer 30µL of sample to a clean epi.

steps.title: Add 10µL of Pippin Loading Solution (stored at 4°C)
steps.instruction: Add 10µL of Pippin Loading Solution (stored at 4°C)

steps.title: Turn on the Pippin Prep
steps.instruction: Turn on the Pippin Prep

steps.title: Perform and optical calibration
steps.instruction: Perform and optical calibration.

steps.title: Navigate to the main menu on...
steps.instruction: Navigate to the main menu on the Pippin and select the most recent run from the drop down menu.

steps.title: Create a new program by navigating...
steps.instruction: Create a new program by navigating to the Protocol Editor and altering the lane numbers.

steps.title: Enter range values in the "BP...
steps.instruction: Enter range values in the "BP Start" and "BP End" as 200-350bp respectively.

steps.title: Select "USE INTERNAL STANDARDS" before saving...
steps.instruction: Select "USE INTERNAL STANDARDS" before saving the protocol under the current date.

steps.title: Prepare the cassette by dislodging all...
steps.instruction: Prepare the cassette by dislodging all bubbles behind the elution wells and filling any low reservoirs with electrophoresis buffer.

steps.title: Remove 40µL of the buffer from...
steps.instruction: Remove 40µL of the buffer from the elution well and refill with fresh buffer before covering the wells with tape.

steps.title: Remove 40µL of electrophoresis buffer from...
steps.instruction: Remove 40µL of electrophoresis buffer from the sample well and replace with 40µL of sample. Repeat for remaning samples.

steps.title: Perform continuity test
steps.instruction: Perform continuity test.

steps.title: Press "Start"
steps.instruction: Press "Start"

steps.title: Once the run is complete, remove...
steps.instruction: Once the run is complete, remove tape from elution wells and retreive 40µL of sample from the well. Repeat for all samples.

steps.title: Remove the cassette from the optical nest
steps.instruction: Remove the cassette from the optical nest. Cover all the wells with aluminum tape.

steps.title: Fill rinse cassette with ddH20, place...
steps.instruction: Fill rinse cassette with ddH20, place it in the cassette and close lid.

steps.title: Allow probes to incubate for one minute
steps.instruction: Allow probes to incubate for one minute. Discard the water and allow cassette to dry before storing.

steps.title: Prepare Amplification Master Mix
steps.instruction: Prepare Amplification Master Mix: Per reaction: undetermined, gH20 undetermined, Taq 2X Master Mix undetermined, Ion Primer Forward undetermined, Ion Primer Reverse ____________________ undetermined, TOTAL -Each multiplexed sample are run in quadruplicate.

steps.title: Add 5µL of size selected sample...
steps.instruction: Add 5µL of size selected sample to 20µL aliquot of PCR Master Mix.

steps.title: Run "RAD-amplification" program
steps.instruction: Run "RAD-amplification" program. 00:56:00, RAD-amplification program

steps.title: Pool all four PCR library replicates
steps.instruction: Pool all four PCR library replicates.

steps.title: Perform a column clean-up with QIAquick...
steps.instruction: Perform a column clean-up with QIAquick PCR Purification Kit Calculate the volume of pooled sample. Add 5 volumes of PB to sample. Transfer 600µL to filter column and spin at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through, add 750µL of PE and spin at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through and spin empty column at 17,900g for 1 minute. Discard flow-through and transfer filter column to new (pre-labelled) epi tube. Add 50µL of EB to the center of the membrane before spinning at 17,900g for 1 minute. Keep flow-through and store at 4°C until size select.

steps.title: Create a 30µL aliquot to 200pM...
steps.instruction: Create a 30µL aliquot to 200pM samole for processing on the Ion Chef.

steps.title: Store all plates and sample pools...
steps.instruction: Store all plates and sample pools at -20°C for long term storage.
